name: kobsidian
description: Filesystem-first MCP server for Obsidian vaults with an LLM-Wiki layer.
long_description: kObsidian exposes 90+ MCP tools across notes, links, tags, tasks, Dataview, Canvas, Kanban, Mermaid, Marp, Templates, and an LLM-Wiki orchestration namespace (wiki.init, wiki.ingest, wiki.query, wiki.lint, etc.). It operates directly on the vault filesystem and optionally bridges to the Obsidian Local REST API plugin for workspace/command actions.

vault_path.title: Obsidian vault path
vault_path.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault kObsidian should operate on.

api_url.title: Obsidian Local REST API URL
api_url.description: Base URL of the Obsidian Local REST API plugin. Leave blank unless you've changed the default port.

rest_api_key.title: Obsidian Local REST API key
rest_api_key.description: Bearer key for the Obsidian Local REST API plugin. Required only if you use workspace.* or commands.* tools.
